Thanks for the PR! A few quick checks before you submit:

- One conceptual change per PR (CONTRIBUTING.md "Pull requests").
- Update the relevant doc under doc/ when behaviour changes.
- Persona prompt changes: include a short rationale below — the
  templates are tightly tuned and small wording changes can shift
  agent behaviour noticeably.
-->
